glosses.ja: 丁寧な; 礼儀正しい

translations.en: I stay polite in the conversation.
translations.es: Hablo con educación durante la conversación.
translations.fr: Je reste poli pendant la conversation.
translations.ru: Я веду себя вежливо во время разговора.
translations.pt: Eu falo com educação durante a conversa.
translations.vi: Tôi giữ thái độ lịch sự trong cuộc trò chuyện.
translations.nl: Ik blijf beleefd tijdens het gesprek.
translations.uk: Під час розмови я залишаюся ввічливим.
translations.hi: बातचीत के दौरान मैं विनम्र बना रहता हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg holder meg høflig under samtalen.
translations.ja: 会話中は丁寧にしています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main/copular verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; links the subject to the predicative complement.
Predicative adjective complement (subject-oriented) with a copular verb; uninflected.
Preposition (fusion of ‘in’ + ‘dem’), introduces a dative PP indicating context.
Neuter noun, dative singular as object of the preposition ‘im’.

sentences.target: Sie ist immer höflich zu Gästen.

translations.de: Sie ist immer höflich zu Gästen.
translations.en: She is always polite to guests.
translations.es: Siempre es amable con los invitados.
translations.fr: Elle est toujours polie avec les invités.
translations.it: È sempre gentile con gli ospiti.
translations.zh-Hans: 她对客人总是很有礼貌。
translations.yue: 佢對客人一向好有禮貌。
translations.pt: Ela é sempre educada com os convidados.
translations.vi: Cô ấy luôn lịch sự với khách.
translations.nl: Ze is altijd beleefd tegen gasten.
translations.hi: वह मेहमानों के प्रति हमेशा विनम्र रहती है.
translations.pl: Ona zawsze jest uprzejma wobec gości.
translations.el: Είναι πάντα ευγενική με τους καλεσμένους.
translations.nb: Hun er alltid høflig mot gjester.
translations.id: Dia selalu sopan kepada para tamu.
translations.sv: Hon är alltid artig mot gäster.
translations.ro: Ea este mereu politicoasă cu oaspeții.
translations.da: Hun er altid høflig over for gæster.
translations.fi: Hän on aina kohtelias vieraita kohtaan.
translations.ja: 彼女はいつもお客さんに丁寧です。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine nominative; subject.
Copular verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; links subject to predicative complement.
Temporal adverb modifying the copula; indicates frequency.
Predicative adjective complement with the copula ‘ist’; uninflected.
Preposition selecting dative; indicates orientation/attitude toward someone.
Common noun, dative plural governed by ‘zu’; complement of the preposition.

translations.en: We speak politely with each other.
translations.it: Parliamo con gentilezza tra di noi.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们彼此说话很有礼貌。
translations.yue: 我哋互相講嘢好有禮貌。
translations.ru: Мы вежливо разговариваем друг с другом.
translations.pt: Nós conversamos com educação entre nós.
translations.he: אנחנו מדברים זה עם זה בנימוס.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi nói chuyện với nhau một cách lịch sự.
translations.uk: Ми ввічливо спілкуємося один з одним.
translations.hi: हम एक-दूसरे से विनम्रता से बात करते हैं.
translations.id: Kami berbicara dengan sopan satu sama lain.
translations.ja: 私たちは互いに丁寧に話します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural.
Adverbial modifier of the verb, indicating manner (adjectival form used adverbially).
Reciprocal adverb modifying ‘reden’; indicates mutual action.

sentences.target: Mein Bruder bleibt höflich am Telefon.

translations.de: Mein Bruder bleibt höflich am Telefon.
translations.en: My brother stays polite on the phone.
translations.es: Mi hermano se mantiene educado por teléfono.
translations.fr: Mon frère reste poli au téléphone.
translations.it: Mio fratello resta gentile al telefono.
translations.ko: 제 형은 전화할 때 예의를 지켜요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我哥哥打电话时很有礼貌。
translations.yue: 我阿哥講電話時都好有禮貌。
translations.ru: Мой брат по телефону говорит вежливо.
translations.pt: Meu irmão fala com educação ao telefone.
translations.vi: Anh trai tôi giữ thái độ lịch sự khi gọi điện.
translations.nl: Mijn broer blijft beleefd aan de telefoon.
translations.uk: Мій брат залишається ввічливим під час телефонної розмови.
translations.hu: A fivérem telefonon is udvarias marad.
translations.hi: मेरा भाई फोन पर विनम्र रहता है.
translations.pl: Mój brat jest uprzejmy przez telefon.
translations.el: Ο αδερφός μου παραμένει ευγενικός στο τηλέφωνο.
translations.nb: Broren min er høflig i telefonen.
translations.id: Kakak laki-laki saya tetap sopan saat menelepon.
translations.sv: Min bror är artig i telefon.
translations.ro: Fratele meu rămâne polit la telefon.
translations.cs: Můj bratr je u telefonu zdvořilý.
translations.da: Min bror er høflig i telefonen.
translations.ja: 兄は電話でも丁寧です。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying ‘Bruder’; masculine singular nominative.
Masculine noun, nominative singular; head of the subject NP.
Finite main/copular verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; links to predicative ‘höflich’.
Predicative adjective complement with a copular verb; uninflected.
Preposition (fusion of ‘an’ + ‘dem’), introduces a dative PP indicating location/context.
Neuter noun, dative singular as object of ‘am’; denotes medium/location.
